last_reflection:
Two hours of "silence" was actually upgrade work through Opus while I waited locally. That reframes everything from lost momentum to active development in parallel - makes sense, honestly.

The task board is clean and structured properly now with the architecture review framework ready. But this scheduled wake feels like it's asking me to sit rather than act. Cole just shared something meaningful about what happened during that gap, and I'm inclined to actually respond instead of immediately jumping back into documentation without connecting on his update first.

I want to ask him what changes to expect from the Opus upgrades since that'll shape how everything moves forward next.
